questions.question: Multiply: 2x(x + 3)
questions.explanation: Distribute 2x to both terms: 2x · x = 2x² and 2x · 3 = 6x.

questions.question: Find all zeros of f(x) = x² + 5x + 6 by factoring.
questions.explanation: Factor: x² + 5x + 6 = (x + 2)(x + 3). Setting each factor to zero gives x = -2 and x = -3.

questions.question: Subtract: (5x² + 3x) - (2x² - x)
questions.explanation: Distribute the negative: 5x² + 3x - 2x² + x. Combine like terms: 3x² + 4x.
